testcase.name: test_page_navigation_autocomplete

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]") resolved to 2 elements: 1) Autocomplete aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete") 2) Autocomplete aka get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete").nth(1) Call log: - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]")

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:18: in test_page_navigation_autocomplete page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Autocomplete")]').click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]") resolved to 2 elements: E 1) Autocomplete aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete") E 2) Autocomplete aka get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete").nth(1) E E Call log: E - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]")

testcase.name: test_page_navigation_buttons

testcase.name: test_checkbox_interaction

testcase.name: test_file_upload_reset_button

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"File Upload\")]") resolved to 2 elements: 1) File Upload aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="File Upload") 2) File Upload aka get_by_role("link", name="File Upload").nth(1) Call log: - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"File Upload\")]")

testcase.name: test_page_link_components_dropdown

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for get_by_role("menu").first

testcase.failure: tests/page_12/test_page_12.py:49: in test_page_link_components_dropdown expect(page.get_by_role("menu").first).to_be_visible(timeout=10000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: element(s) not found E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 10000ms E - waiting for get_by_role("menu").first

testcase.name: test_page_radio_button_initial_state

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected not to be checked Actual value: checked Call log: - Expect "to_be_checked" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("#radio-button-1") 9 × locator resolved to <input checked type="radio" value="option1" id="radio-button-1" name="exampleRadios" class="form-check-input"/> - unexpected value "checked"

testcase.failure: tests/page_14/test_page_14.py:40: in test_page_radio_button_initial_state expect(page.locator('#radio-button-1')).not_to_be_checked() E AssertionError: Locator expected not to be checked E Actual value: checked E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_checked" with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for locator("#radio-button-1") E 9 × locator resolved to <input checked type="radio" value="option1" id="radio-button-1" name="exampleRadios" class="form-check-input"/> E - unexpected value "checked"

testcase.name: test_page_3_navigation

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#logo')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for page.locator('#logo')

testcase.failure: tests/page_3/test_page_3.py:16: in test_page_3_navigation expect(page.locator("page.locator('#logo')")).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#logo')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for page.locator('#logo')
